{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113434902A9A6D46E1EFAA4E91F"}"},"total":118},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615205963565548350","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我还是那句话，作者如果能按照这个风格写下去，网文界绝对有你的席位，看到目前为止，这一本的风格，人物描写，堪称顶级，能让我有同样感觉的只有《天不应》，作者加油！","text_exts":[{"e":72,"s":69,"text":"天不应","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%8D%E5%BA%94&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774071829FAA4E91F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615205963565548350%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227302328069107223562%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%8D%E5%BA%94%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773055461,"group_id":"7302328069107223562","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"最强咸鱼随缘更新，专业摆烂二十年。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8xuEqSjMLQwvYYOa+O3qA8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fc8c7937fc7e4b6f89f4ae045e494a36~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620908&x-signature=Nbv%2BeOaWr%2BW%2BRUYyoVZfoeJtu1Q%3D","user_id":"112575921526202","user_name":"热心市民东赫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"112575921526202","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7302328069107223562","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出所以低，无须在意）
【救赎+从小养老婆女帝+信息通透+布局策划发育+吃自己种的软饭+自制各时期角色图+父爱变质】
那一夜大雪，程澈用三枚铜板，买下了那个手里紧攥瓦片、眼神如狼的十岁女孩。
“以后，我养你。”
一句承诺，他把未来的女帝当女儿宠，更当老婆养！
为了给她洗精伐髓，他如奸商般游走于各大势力，空手套白狼狂赚万金；
为了护她周全，他以凡人之躯布局天下，一句话吓退修仙大能，一眼看穿绝世杀手死穴！
从面黄肌瘦的小乞丐，到肌肤如玉的倾城少女；
从被人踩在泥里摩擦，到十八岁踏入武尊境，一刀斩杀来犯强敌！
看着浴桶中觉醒凤骨、浑身散发着神性光辉的绝美少女，程澈还没来得及感叹吾家有女初长成，下一秒，那个高冷的“神女”却湿漉漉地钻进他怀里，像只粘人的猫。
“程澈，我变强了，以后换我保护你。”
看着在他怀里睡得流口水的未来女帝，程澈无奈一笑：
这哪是养女儿，分明是养了个能把天捅破的小祖宗！
（本书又名：女帝养成计划、我的老婆是最终BOSS）
（主打养成的快乐，目前十三岁，处于三观塑造期，随着年龄增加对男主的感情会愈发复杂也会有叛逆期。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d9b9b0be3b9743a23a4b0132e5a61d6c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"带专大王","author_id":"","book_id":"7302328069107223562","book_name":"我负责氪金，养大的女帝负责乱杀","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7599293025403011609","read_count":"34426","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"415855"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.0","serial_count":"132","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,女帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fcfb94c3ea4c49a763aa9716f6ab61fd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255829&x-signature=%2FEuQz%2F9SvkZm94gu7jHeGgZS7C0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2137047962759437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"142"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113434902A9A6D46E1EFAA4E91F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评
